acceptance_criteria.criterion: A complete runnable app exists in manager-test-app and reflects the Phone Lunk Alarm concept.

evidence: Fresh Vite + React + TypeScript app in src/App.tsx with camera preview, manual phone spot simulation, alarm modes, detection counter, clearable overlay, and responsive UI
Worker ran npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 and curl -I http://127.0.0.1:5173/ returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The worker explains what was borrowed conceptually from phone-lunk-alarm and what was rebuilt.

evidence.evidence: Worker receipt explains the reference app is a larger Next.js/Tailwind/TensorFlow camera detector with sound, recording, theme persistence, and Playwright flows, while this rebuild keeps the core idea and privacy/alarm UX with a deterministic local React app and no wholesale copied components, styles, tests, or assets.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: README/setup instructions are present and accurate for the new app.

evidence.evidence: README.md contains setup, verification, concept-vs-rebuild notes, and known gaps; tail shows README was updated with Quick Start and Verification commands.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Build/test/lint verification passes, or any failure is explicitly explained with next steps.

commands.evidence: worker event tail shows eslint command exited 0
worker event tail: src/App.test.tsx 5 tests passed
worker event tail: vite production build completed

criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria manager-test-phone-lunk-refresh --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria manager-test-phone-lunk-refresh --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria manager-test-phone-lunk-refresh --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.
